description:
Offered: every spring; occasionally summer
This course is a continuation of BIOL 1200 . The following systems are covered: circulatory, respiratory, digestive, excretory, endocrine, and reproductive.
Prerequisite(s): BIOL 1200
Note: Not open to students who have completed BIOL 1700 - Human Biology or BIOL 2420 - Human Physiology .
Meets General Education Requirement(s): PL
